title: Jaques of London Original Tonbridge Croquet Set 4 Players | Beginners Set 30" Croquet Mallets | Premium Lawn Games | Since 1795
features: Complete Croquet Set for 4 Players | This set includes everything you need: 4 beginner mallets, croquet balls in the first colours, metal hoops, a winning post, and a natural fibre drawstring bag.
Crafted Quality | Mallets are made from premium wood with solid handles. Designed for balance, precision, and durability.
Perfect for Garden Gatherings | Ideal for summer picnics, parties, or casual lawn games with friends and family.
Trusted Since 1795 | From the inventors of Croquet, Jaques of London brings over 228 years of outdoor game excellence.
description: Our Tonbridge Croquet set includes: 4 x Beginner Croquet Mallets (Overall length approximately 30"). Set of 4 1st colour Croquet Balls Set of 6 Beginner Croquet Hoops 1 x Beginner winning peg 1 x Simplified Croquet rule book 1 x Drawstring Bag A Perfect Croquet Set to get youngsters involved in the game of Croquet, or indeed a great Travel set. Beginner Croquet Mallets: Overall length approximately 30" Croquet Balls: 3" or 7.5cm Diameter Drawstring Bag: 37 1/2" x 10 1/2" (95cm x 26.5cm)
